dataQuality: Best-effort public playground map from official data.gov.sg datasets plus small curated overrides for known public playgrounds missing from official playground-specific fields. NParks point coordinates are indicative. Area values describe the managed-area or park polygon where available, not the exact play-equipment footprint.

sources.name: NParks Parks
sources.use: Dedicated playground points identified by names containing PG or PLAYGROUND.

sources.name: NParks Parks and Nature Reserves
sources.use: Managed-area polygon sizes joined by name.

sources.name: Parks@SG
sources.use: Parks that explicitly list Playground as an amenity.

sources.name: Curated playground overrides
sources.use: Known public playgrounds missing from official playground-specific fields, tracked in config/curated-playgrounds.json.

playgrounds.name: Admiralty Park Playground
amenities: Carpark Toilets Shelters Nature trail Fitness corner or stations and fitness equipment or exercise station Food and beverage area or restaurant or café Cycling track Amphitheatre Boardwalk
playgrounds.curationReason: Parks@SG publishes Admiralty Park, but its amenity text does not list Playground even though the playground is visible as a public map place.
notes: Curated because official source fields publish the park but do not expose this playground as a playground amenity.
Coordinates point to the playground area rather than the park centroid.
Area is joined from the official park or managed-area polygon, not a measured playground footprint.
